_instructions: Fill in all values below. Remove this _instructions key before running. All secrets must be environment variable names (prefixed with $), never actual values.

project._existingProjectPath_note: Required only when mode is 'existing'. Absolute path to your test project root.
project._newProjectPath_note: Required only when mode is 'new'. Absolute path where new project will be created.

_type_notes.oidc-ping-pkce: SPA / public client using Channel Secure Ping with PKCE. No client secret. Uses code_verifier + code_challenge.
_type_notes.oidc-ping: Confidential client with client secret (server-side apps).
_type_notes.oidc-standard: Standard OIDC authorization code flow with client secret.

auth._clientId_note: Public client ID only. PKCE flow does not use a client secret.
auth._clientSecret_note: Leave null for PKCE (oidc-ping-pkce). Only set for confidential clients (oidc-ping, oidc-standard).

pkce._enabled_note: Set true for SPA/public clients using PKCE. The agent handles code_verifier and code_challenge automatically via browser interception.
pkce._codeChallengeMethod_note: S256 (SHA-256 hash) is the standard. Plain is insecure and should not be used.
pkce._redirectUri_note: Must exactly match the redirect_uri registered in Ping for this client.

auth._loginPageTitle_note: Title or heading text on the OIDC/Ping login page for detection
auth._usernameSelector_note: CSS selector for username field on the Ping login page
auth._postLoginUrlPattern_note: URL fragment that confirms successful login and redirect back to app

crawl._maxDepth_note: How many navigation levels deep to crawl (1=homepage only, 3=recommended)
crawl._excludeRoutes_note: Routes to skip during DOM crawl
crawl._includeRoutes_note: If populated, ONLY these routes are crawled. Leave empty for full crawl.
crawl._interactionProbing_note: If true, agent will interact with forms to discover conditional fields
crawl._waitForSelector_note: CSS selector to wait for before capturing DOM on each page
